title: agalinis aspera
intro: Agalinis aspera, also known as rough green dragon or rough agalinis, is a plant species in the genus Agalinis, native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Agalinis aspera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat the mentioned health issues.
